title: Surf's Up, Geronimo!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked into a terrible vacation full of sharks, cockroaches, and crazy stunts — but he survives to tell the tale! 🏄

options.en: The lifeguard at Rathole Hotel Beach according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 鼠洞酒店海滩的救生员（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The publisher of The Rodent's Gazette
A travel agent in New Mouse City
options.zh: 新鼠城的一名旅行代理人
杰罗尼摩那个讨厌的表哥

explain.en: He introduces himself as the publisher of The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular paper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 书中他自我介绍是《老鼠公报》的出版人，那是鼠岛上最受欢迎的报纸。

q.en: Which cousin tricks Geronimo into taking a bad vacation?
q.zh: 是哪个表哥把杰罗尼摩骗去度一个糟糕的假？

explain.en: Trap pulls Geronimo's tail and takes him to Smoothie Slickpaws's shabby travel agency in a dark alley.
explain.zh: 特拉普拽住杰罗尼摩的尾巴，把他带到了斯莫基·斯利克保斯那家开在漆黑小巷里的破旧旅行社。

q.en: What is the name of Smoothie Slickpaws's travel agency?
q.zh: 斯莫基·斯利克保斯的旅行社叫什么名字？

options.en: The Rodent's Gazette according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 老鼠公报（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: It's a shabby agency in a dark alley, far from the main streets of New Mouse City.
explain.zh: 那是新鼠城主街远处一条漆黑小巷里一家破旧的旅行社。

q.en: What airline does Geronimo fly to the island?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩乘坐哪家航空公司的飞机去岛上？

explain.en: He had never flown Last Gasp Airways before; the seats were old and worn with dust balls in the aisle.
explain.zh: 他以前从没坐过最后一口气航空，飞机座椅又旧又破，过道里还有灰尘团。

q.en: What is the name of the island Geronimo visits?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩去度假的岛叫什么名字？

options.en: Quack Islands according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 嘎嘎岛（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: His flight arrives at San Shabby Fur Island, where the weather is either pouring rain or extremely hot.
explain.zh: 他的航班抵达邋遢毛岛，那里天气要么下大雨，要么热得能烤熟皮毛。

q.en: What room number is Geronimo given at the Rathole Hotel?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在鼠洞酒店被分到几号房间？

options.en: 404 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: He stays in room 313 and is a little superstitious about the unlucky number thirteen.
explain.zh: 他住313房间，对不吉利的数字13有点迷信。

q.en: What is Geronimo's 'personalized transfer' from the airport?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩从机场得到的“专属接送”是什么？

options.en: A private helicopter according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一架私人直升机（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A bicycle he must pedal twenty miles in the rain
options.zh: 一辆要他在雨中蹬二十英里的自行车

explain.en: The note says the personalized transfer means he must pedal the bike himself to the hotel, twenty miles away in the pouring rain.
explain.zh: 纸条上写着专属接送就是他自己蹬自行车去二十英里外的酒店，当时还下着大雨。

q.en: Who is the noisy young mouselet that bothers Geronimo on the plane?
q.zh: 在飞机上一直吵闹烦扰杰罗尼摩的小老鼠是谁？

options.en: Benjamin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 本杰明（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bratfur sits next to Geronimo, asks endless questions, and even steals his cream cheese candy.
explain.zh: 布拉特弗坐在杰罗尼摩旁边，不停地问问题，还偷走了他的奶油奶酪糖。

q.en: Who saves Geronimo when a shark appears while he is swimming?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩游泳时遇到鲨鱼，是谁救了他？

options.en: Smoothie Slickpaws according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 斯莫基·斯利克保斯（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Crusher, the muscle-bound lifeguard, reaches out and pulls Geronimo onto the boat just in time.
explain.zh: 肌肉发达的救生员克拉舍伸出爪子，及时把杰罗尼摩拉上了船。

q.en: Who really signed Geronimo up for the extreme sports like bungee jumping?
q.zh: 到底是谁把杰罗尼摩报名去蹦极等极限运动的？

options.en: Bratfur, writing Geronimo's name on the board
options.zh: 布拉特弗，他在板上写下了杰罗尼摩的名字

options.en: Crusher the lifeguard according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 救生员克拉舍（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo sneaks up and sees Bratfur scribbling his name after every activity on the Extreme Sports board.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩悄悄走上前，发现布拉特弗在“极限运动板”上每项活动后面都写上了他的名字。
